_readme: The FAQ page. Each item in 'faqs' is one question (q) and its answer (a). Add, remove, or reorder freely — keep each entry as a { "q": "...", "a": "..." } pair.

faqs.q: How long until I get my portrait?
faqs.a: Most portraits are painted and shipped within 3-5 days. I'll confirm timing with you after you order. Shipping depends on your location!
A clear, well-lit photo of your pet's face works best — natural light, looking toward the camera. Send a few and I'll pick the strongest, or tell me your favorite.

faqs.q: How big is it and what's it painted on?
faqs.a: Every portrait is 8×10 inches, hand-painted in acrylic on watercolor paper. It arrives unframed and ready to frame.

faqs.q: Where does it ship from, and how?
faqs.a: Each portrait ships from Pompano Beach, FL. Payment, and shipping are all handled through Etsy.

faqs.q: Can I ask for a specific background color?
faqs.a: Yes — leave a note on your Etsy order and I'll work it into the piece.
